entities.name: Celia Davis
entities.context: Founder of Connections, early-stage operator focused on product vision, go-to-market, and fundraising

entities.name: Connections
entities.context: Mobile-first social network for young professionals, focused on deep reciprocal relationships rather than shallow connections

entities.name: Reciprocity
entities.context: Social science principle Celia believes should underpin social products - mutual help and shared journeys

entities.name: Compatibility-driven introductions
entities.context: Core product mechanism replacing engagement feeds with intentional matching for conversations/meetings

entities.name: Data as insight
entities.context: Philosophy that data should provide insight about future of work and talent markets, not be sold for ads

entities.name: B2B2C channels
entities.context: Growth strategy including institutional partners like university career centers alongside direct-to-consumer

entities.name: Pre-seed round Q1
entities.context: Fundraising milestone Celia is actively preparing for, refining product narrative and data strategy

relationships.context: Founder with strong ownership over product vision, go-to-market, and fundraising
